message:
fix(lowering): clarify Call vs HostCall argument-popping comment and update beads

Correct the inline comment in lower_ir2_to_ir3 to accurately describe
the distinction: Call pops the callee register plus arguments, while
HostCall pops only the arguments (no callee register on the stack).
The previous wording ("pop 1 as a fallback") was misleading about the
intent of the HostCall path.

Beads: refresh bd-1lsy.5.2 (RGC-402 CJS/ESM interop) timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
